节点.功能描述: Generates a key. This API uses an asynchronous callback to return the result. and key length are mandatory. this API does not return the key content because the key is always protected in a TEE. If an exception occurs in the generation process, an error is captured. 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified. 2. Incorrect parameter types. 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string } keyAlias - keyAlias indicates the key's name.
@param { HuksOptions } options - Tags required for generating the key. The algorithm, key purpose,
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - Callback used to return the result. If the operation is successful,
@throws { BusinessError } 12000001 - algorithm mode is not supported
@throws { BusinessError } 12000006 - error occurred in crypto engine
@throws { BusinessError } 12000012 - Device environment or input parameter abnormal
@throws { BusinessError } 12000013 - queried credential does not exist
@throws { BusinessError } 12000015 - Failed to obtain the security information via UserIAM
@throws { BusinessError } 12000017 - The key with same alias is already exist

parameters.说明: keyAlias indicates the key's name.
Tags required for generating the key. The algorithm, key purpose,
Callback used to return the result. If the operation is successful,

error_codes.description: Device environment or input parameter abnormal
Failed to obtain the security information via UserIAM
The key with same alias is already exist

节点.功能描述: Generates a key. This API uses a promise to return the result. Because the key is always protected in a trusted environment (such as a TEE), the promise does not return the key content. It returns only the information indicating whether the API is successfully called. and key length are mandatory. 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified. 2. Incorrect parameter types. 3. Parameter verification failed.

@param { HuksOptions } options - Tags required for generating the key. The algorithm, key purpose,

@throws { BusinessError } 12000006 - error occurred in crypto engine
@throws { BusinessError } 12000012 - Device environment or input parameter abnormal
@throws { BusinessError } 12000013 - queried credential does not exist
@throws { BusinessError } 12000015 - Failed to obtain the security information via UserIAM
@throws { BusinessError } 12000017 - The key with same alias is already exist

Tags required for generating the key. The algorithm, key purpose,

节点.功能描述: Deletes a key. This API uses an asynchronous callback to return the result. was generated. to specify the security level of the key to delete. HuksAuthStorageLevel can be left empty, which means the default value HUKS_AUTH_STORAGE_LEVEL_DE is used. no err value is returned; otherwise, an error code is returned. 1. 节点.功能描述: Imports a wrapped key. This API uses an asynchronous callback to return the result. The algorithm, key purpose, and key length are mandatory. no err value is returned; otherwise, an error code is returned. 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified. 2. Incorrect parameter types. 3. Parameter verification failed.

@throws { BusinessError } 12000006 - error occurred in crypto engine

@throws { BusinessError } 12000012 - Device environment or input parameter abnormal
@throws { BusinessError } 12000013 - queried credential does not exist
@throws { BusinessError } 12000015 - Failed to obtain the security information via UserIAM
@throws { BusinessError } 12000017 - The key with same alias is already exist
